scope: Project-level reusable multi-state character reference board for Northern Beastfolk Alliance siege troop archetypes.

locked_references.role: global low-magic eastern epic mood lock
project material and tactile surface lock
border-to-north regional color reference for blackstone snowline, frozen earth, ochre grass, and blue survival fire
Northern bone, wood, fur, hide rope, oath cord, and frost material reference
locked Northern Beastfolk Alliance emblem reference; do not redesign
locked Northern symbol extension board for bonewood oath knots, horn-branch marks, claw-tooth cuts, feather wood pieces, and blue fire points
Northern noble shaman contrast; siege troops must not inherit Luming's aristocratic or shamanic silhouette

assets.name_cn: 北境攻城兵种通用多状态角色板
downstream_usage: Prompt Room Northern siege troop identity and costume-system lock
ComfyUI reference input for siege, breach, shield-wall, tunneling, wall-climb, and blackstone border shots
Reusable crowd construction for small groups of identifiable Northern siege units
Prop and costume continuity reference for bone armor, fur, horn, hide rope, oath cord, old iron, and blackstone-snow wear

batch_rules: Do not redesign existing faction emblems.
Use the locked Northern Beastfolk Alliance bonewood emblem language only as tiny physical oath knot, shield-back tag, drum-edge charm, tool tag, or wood-carved reference.
Every full-body model must be identifiable by species proportion, silhouette, weapon, and costume function, not merely by swapped weapon props.
Keep Northern siege troops as a disaster-driven political coalition with equipment and logistics, not a monster horde.
Preserve role distinctions: Blackfang breacher, Ironhorn shield-wall soldier, Snowbadger tunneler, and Snowfeather wall-climber.
Do not make any model look like Luming's noble shaman costume, Grey Wall human soldiers, Suming insect infantry, or a new faction mascot.
No visible text, labels, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, or watermark inside generated images.
